module_info.docstring:
Tests for delta-first budget architecture.

Delta-first means: check ETags BEFORE extracting code bodies, so unchanged
symbols never trigger expensive code extraction.

methods.name: test_returns_signatures_not_code
methods.docstring: Signatures should be returned without code bodies.

methods.name: test_includes_call_graph
methods.docstring: Signatures should include call graph information.

methods.name: test_respects_depth
methods.docstring: Depth parameter should limit call graph traversal.

methods.name: test_ambiguous_without_disambiguate_returns_error
methods.docstring: Ambiguous entry without disambiguation should return error dict.

methods.name: test_returns_signatures_for_hunks
methods.docstring: Should return signatures for symbols in diff hunks.

methods.name: test_includes_callers_and_callees
methods.docstring: Should include callers and callees of changed symbols.

methods.name: test_unchanged_symbols_not_extracted
methods.docstring: Unchanged symbols should not trigger code extraction.

classes.name: TestDeltaContextPacks
classes.docstring: Tests for context pack with delta mode.

methods.name: test_context_pack_delta_mode
methods.docstring: Context pack should work in delta mode.

methods.name: test_diff_context_delta_mode
methods.docstring: Diff context should work in delta mode.

functions.name: sample_project
functions.docstring: Create a sample Python project for testing.
